horoscope: Mercury aligns with Mars and Saturn in your sign today, dear Aries, and your words tend to stick more than usual, so make sure they represent you! You might take a closer, perhaps critical, look at personal plans to see where you might make some improvements. Others might call on you for advice. If, however, you're feeling a little misunderstood or let down, keep in mind that your dreams are still possible; they only need some refinement. As well, consider that the trade-off to projecting an air of competence is that you may not always receive support or warmth from others. This is not the best day for neediness, over-the-top emotions, or cutting corners, though, as there is a business-like quality to the energy of the day, but do consider the changes you can make in the future. Be careful not to push anything to the breaking point -- or push yourself too hard. Apply your tremendous mental energy to something productive and useful. This week is powerful for self-improvement efforts, and also for coming into your own. Today, there can be a competitive feel, and it may very well be coming from within. There can be an idea or project that excites and motivates you now. Focus on improving or bettering your personal best, and you will do very well.

You could feel the weight of decisions, dear Taurus, and you're considering long-standing problems that now need attention. With today's transits, you may feel a strong urge to settle issues left unresolved. You might find yourself in a situation where the past is catching up with you today, and you're ready to put it behind you. It may be better to keep silent about some issues now, as others may tend to view emotional matters in absolute terms -- compassion and understanding may be missing just for the time being, so you may want to plan conversations accordingly. However, this can also help you to firm up and make practical choices that truly help you move forward happier and lighter. It can be a day of vivid dreams and memories. Instead of allowing your mind to race, consider channeling all of this extra mental energy into something productive. There may be gossip to deal with or a sense that others know something you don't, but try not to let this make you tense. A lot is going on under the surface and behind the scenes, and there may be some exciting developments in your private life. An obstacle or bump in the road may temporarily delay a pursuit, and it can be challenging to find the chance to express yourself as you want just for now, but it may be best to stew on things a little longer.

Today's transits encourage rational thinking and special attention to your responsibilities, dear Gemini. Coming up with solid, firm, and practical plans for the future can be in focus. You may want to settle a long-standing problem, or you can be gathering ideas and wanting to put them into action. There can be a reality check or a block to manage, which necessitates slowing down and getting things right. You can have strong ideas and experience powerful motivation regarding a particular pursuit, but there can be some realities to contend with first. It's easy for you to get quite fired up about issues close to your heart, and your feelings about a friend or your social connections can also be more intense. A rude awakening may or may not work in your favor, so choose your battles wisely now. Or, if you feel compelled to bring up a touchy subject, take extra time to express yourself mindfully. Rushing things today can end up delaying them! If something has been impeding your social life or long-term goals, you'll feel the tension, and restructuring, organizing, and budgeting may be in order. Look for ways that can help you feel more in control and back on track. Decisions can be challenging to arrive at, but satisfying once made. This is not the time for taking shortcuts -- a thorough job is important now.

The weight of your responsibilities or work can be on you right now, dear Cancer, but it's also a time when you're motivated to solve problems. It makes sense to be more aware of what you're communicating, since your words not only have more impact than usual today but can also stick around for quite some time. If you create a story that doesn't quickly disappear, aim to make it a good one! It's also important to recognize that people may be taking things at face value rather than noticing the fine or subtle points. Fortunately, it's a powerful time to get your priorities straight. Still, buried hurts can jump out of hiding today, or situations demand more mental engagement and attention from you. Career projects may be subject to scrutiny, and flaws may be revealed that need fixing. There can be criticism to deal with, but after the initial sting, you may very well find the motivation to improve things, if only to protect yourself from further scrutiny. It's a time for fixing weak areas and doing important work towards long-term happiness and prosperity.

You're taking things more seriously than usual today, dear Leo, with today's transits that put you in a determined, practical mindset. Although you may want to take action, the need for patience becomes obvious now. You could be making small sacrifices to help you secure big gains in the future. Giving up a pleasure for a benefit in another life department can create some tension, but you can see the value of these strategic moves. Reality can bring you back to earth on a matter. Educational or travel plans and other projects may require fine-tuning. The good news is that you are likely to have better information to move your plans forward in practical ways. You're also getting into a good position for renewing a commitment to studies, a writing project, or long-term venture that's close to your heart. However, you'll probably need to pay extra attention to emotional cues when relating to others on a personal level, as you are living in the mind today. You might easily defend a cause or express an opinion and possibly get into a heated debate. If you harness the energy of today's alignments, you can use your extra sharpness and your can-do attitude for good, putting a past problem to rest.

Decisions about financial matters may be pressing now, dear Virgo, and can be long-term and/or significant as Mercury, Mars, and Saturn form an alignment today. It's a good time for thinking about ways to cut back on excesses. A partner may be strict with you, or you may feel temporarily unsupported, but it can lead to a stronger grip on what's realistic and where you stand. You can also feel empowered as you take care of your needs quite well on your own. While there could be some realities to face today, you're bound to turn a corner and mentally change directions. You can come out of the day feeling far more confident about your plans. This is particularly the case with business affairs and also your feelings about a person or a relationship. There may be news or worries about financial matters, but you are more equipped than usual to take steps to improve your situation. This is a day for high mental energy, and you feel motivated to do things you've been letting slide. Consider that there can be a decided emphasis on the mind rather than the heart today. However, the day may give you added courage to express yourself, and this can be useful. Ideas work you up, and you may feel a little fed up with a situation that's been dragging on too long.

An alignment in your partnership sector today points to serious thoughts or conversations about relationships, dear Libra. There can be decisions made about a relationship, or a sudden awareness of responsibilities toward others. Or, this can be a time for making joint plans, decisions, and commitments. Counseling or negotiating can be in the spotlight. Others may be withholding or strict with you, or possibly more demanding than usual, but if you must face a reality today, you should bear in mind that you're probably better off for it, as holding on to unrealizable dreams will not serve you well in the long run. However, advice can be useful now, and even others' criticisms can motivate you to make improvements. A strong desire to take action is likely, but an aggravation or assertion from a partner who wants to take the lead can also figure strongly. It's too easy to get yourself into an argument, even if you are not doing so intentionally, so choose your battles wisely! You could find you're attracting disagreement or conflict today, but in some cases, a confrontation may be just what a relationship needs right now. You can be particularly focused on ideas or movement, and possibly both, but you may need to let your brain rest. Try to channel the extra energy you have into genuinely productive activities.

You may sober up in a particular area of your life today, dear Scorpio, especially related to your health, work, habits, duties, chores, and routines. Mercury, Mars, and Saturn join forces, and you're inclined to see the practical or realistic side of the story. You can feel pressed to solve problems, and if handled well, you can tackle issues with courage and energy that may be missing on other days. It can feel great to put a nagging problem behind you, particularly something related to work or health. You're tired of just thinking about things — you want to get things moving. The urge to sort out minor problems, iron out flaws, and eliminate waste or excess drives you, so use this extra energy boost to clear up the clutter in your daily life. Watch for sharp and rude words or communications that can be misconstrued as such. Others may not be working as quickly as you are or contributing as much, which can be frustrating. Even if criticisms are irritating, consider strengthening your position so that they don't get to you in the future.

Love and even recreation can have heavy energy today, dear Sagittarius, and commitments may be made or broken -- either way, there is no mystery about them! It's a time for clarity of thought and intention. In fact, constructive solutions to recent problems can be discovered now. There can be a little more seriousness regarding a love relationship or creative project, but it can feel wonderful to commit to a person or project or to make an important resolution. You may be thinking of valuable ways to improve your enjoyment of life, or you can apply yourself with more discipline and determination to a craft. The day brings nervous energy but also mental courage, and you're inclined to make strong decisions, particularly concerning love, entertainment, pleasure, or dating. Mental excitement can be helpful, but do watch if it crosses the line into irritation or aggravation. You may be tense or driven, and you may get an extra push to get a project going, taking more pride in your ideas or creations. There can be much thinking or conversing about particular issues that have been blocking your progress. Taking a critical look at a relationship or creative pursuit can be in focus, or you might recognize the need to buckle down.

With today's alignment in your solar fourth house, dear Capricorn, you're thinking a lot about your personal life and domestic world. You're in the position to assess issues realistically, and your sense of priorities is strong. Interactions with others can be edgy and tense at times, or things can seem fine until there's a difference of opinion. However, this can also be a time to discover flaws in a plan that are irritating now but ultimately free you. Watch for haste with words and moves. This is a high-energy day on a mental level, and you can very easily become all wound up! It's a time when something that has been dragging on too long frustrates you, and you want to do something about it. There can be blocks to getting your message across or getting from one place to another without incident. Having all the facts can feel good, but it's not a well-rounded picture, so reserve judgment. If you've failed to address problem areas, you will need to face the music today. There can be criticisms to deal with, but as a result, you may decide to strengthen uncertain areas, and you feel more confident going forward.

Today's transits can help set the stage for a commitment to a significant project, dear Aquarius, or it can be a time for firming up a project or clinching a deal. You're in a great position for concentrated study and attention to detail. You can be in quite a serious frame of mind, or there's a lot on your mind. It's a mentally high-energy day, and it's a time when something that has been dragging on too long frustrates you, and you do something about it. It's also a "last straw" energy. You're passionate about what you do and probably very excited about sharing ideas or stating your case. New ideas can be all-consuming and exciting. Because people, including you, may not be saying what's in their hearts, it may be best to keep some emotional distance if engaging in debates. Try not to take things, especially said or done in impatience, too seriously. Although the day requires more discipline than usual and a realistic outlook, look for ways to be both firm and kind with yourself and others.

An alignment in your resources sector today prompts down-to-earth thinking, dear Pisces, but also some pressure to take action. You can benefit from taking a critical look at your finances or giving your practical affairs a good "think." Aim to be realistic but not pessimistic or hasty. The more secure you feel now, the better you can share later, so don't worry about prioritizing your needs at this time. While you may be all fired up about pursuing something today, circumstances seem to slow you down or stand in your way, or people in your life appear unyielding and not very sympathetic to your cause. Be kind to yourself and avoid pushing something too hard, but don't let go of your passions or motivations in the process. You may need to adjust your goals. It's wise to avoid impulsive communications so that you can reclaim your personal power. You are filled with energy and vision today — try not to waste it arguing a point. Consider that delays can help you pace yourself, or if needed, redirect you along a better path. In the end, relying on yourself can be much more satisfying than you first imagined.
